subtitle.message: Configure the provider that translates Udemy, YouTube, NVIDIA Academy, and Vimeo subtitles with full document context.

fallbackDescription.message:
LLM translation can take time. Choose the temporary provider to show first while it is running.
DeepL becomes selectable after you enter an API key and pass the connection test.

customWebFontGuide.message: Choose a font on Noonnu, then copy the "Use as web font" section into the text box below.

testing.message: Sending a test request to the selected provider...

modelsLoadedAndTested.message: $provider$: Selected $model$ and passed the connection test ($count$ models)

modelsLoadedTestFailed.message: $provider$: Selected $model$, but the connection test failed - $error$

localModelSelected.message: $provider$: Selected $model$ ($count$ models, connection test not run)

providerTestRequired.message: No provider has passed the connection test.

activeProviderGuide.message: Google Translate is always available. Other providers become selectable after a successful connection test.

backupRestoreDescription.message: Back up or restore current settings, including API keys, in an encrypted file. The backup password is not stored, so keep it safe.

backupSeedGuide.message: Use at least 8 characters with one letter, one number, and one special character. Regular spaces are allowed inside the password.

backupCreating.message: Encrypting settings and creating the backup file...

restoreReading.message: Decrypting the backup file and restoring settings...

restoreTestKeysConfirm.message:
Test the connection validity of API keys in the restored settings now?
One minimal connection request will be sent to each provider.

restoreKeyTestComplete.message: Settings restored and API keys tested: $success$/$total$ succeeded, $failed$ failed

restoreNoKeysToTest.message: Settings restored. There are no API keys to test.

restoreConfirm.message: Replace the current settings with the backup file?

backupFileTooLarge.message: The backup file must be 5 MB or smaller.

backupInvalidJson.message: The selected file is not valid backup JSON.

backupUnsupportedFormat.message: This backup file format is not supported.

backupDecryptFailed.message: The backup password is incorrect or the backup file is damaged.

backupInvalidSettings.message: The settings data in the backup is invalid.

backupSeedMinLength.message: The backup password must be at least 8 characters.

backupSeedLetter.message: Include at least one English letter in the backup password.

backupSeedNumber.message: Include at least one number in the backup password.

backupSeedSpecial.message: Include at least one special character in the backup password.

backupSeedWhitespace.message: Leading or trailing spaces, tabs, and line breaks are not allowed in the backup password.

backupSeedMismatch.message: The backup passwords do not match.

backupPasswordDescription.message: The backup password is not stored. You will need the same password to restore the backup file.

extensionDescription.message: Translate Udemy, YouTube, NVIDIA Academy, and Vimeo subtitles with full-context LLM providers.

styleLecture.message: Lecture - Explanatory translation for courses and tutorials

contentQuotaFallback.message: API quota exceeded. Falling back to Google Translate.

contentMissingUdemy.message: Could not find Udemy lecture information.

contentMissingYoutube.message: Could not find YouTube video information.

contentMissingNvidia.message: Could not find NVIDIA Academy caption information.

contentMissingVimeo.message: Could not find Vimeo caption information.

localLlmBaseUrlComment.message: # Enter only the part before /chat/completions in Base URL.

providerGuideGoogleTranslate.message: Default translation engine. Uses the Google Translate endpoint without an API key.

providerGuideDeepl.message: DeepL API provider. Find the API key on the DeepL account API keys page, then configure the endpoint for your Free or Pro plan. The Free plan has monthly character usage limits.

providerGuideOpenai.message: Uses the OpenAI Responses API. Create an API key in the OpenAI Platform API keys page, then enter a model available to your account. Usage limits and pricing can vary by account, model, and tier.

providerGuideAnthropic.message: Uses the Anthropic Messages API. Create an API key in the Claude Platform keys page. Requests include the anthropic-version header. Usage limits and pricing can vary by account, model, and tier.

providerGuideGoogle.message: Uses the Google AI Gemini generateContent API. You can create an API key in Google AI Studio, and the key is sent as a URL query parameter. Rate limits and pricing can vary by project, model, and tier.

providerGuideOpenrouter.message: Uses OpenRouter's OpenAI-compatible chat/completions API. Create an API key in the OpenRouter keys page. The free plan and free-model API usage are rate limited.

providerGuideNvidiaNim.message: Uses NVIDIA NIM's OpenAI-compatible chat/completions API. Create an API key in the NVIDIA API keys page. NVIDIA API Catalog provides free endpoints for development/prototyping, with model/account usage limits that can apply.

providerGuideLocal.message: Uses the OpenAI-compatible chat/completions format. In Base URL, enter only the part before /chat/completions. Example: http://localhost:1234/v1
